test.create_query: CREATE TABLE array_distance_mixed ( id UInt64, u8 Array(UInt8), f64 Array(Float64) ) ENGINE = Memory;
test.fill_query: INSERT INTO array_distance_float32 SELECT number, arrayMap(i -> toFloat32((number + i) % 257), range(4096)) FROM numbers(100000);
INSERT INTO array_distance_mixed SELECT number, arrayMap(i -> toUInt8((number + i) % 256), range(4096)), arrayMap(i -> toFloat64((number + i) % 257), range(4096)) FROM numbers(100000);
test.query: SELECT sum(d) FROM ( SELECT L1Distance(arrayResize(v, {array_size}), arrayResize(materialize(v), {array_size})) AS d FROM array_distance_float32 )
SELECT sum(d) FROM ( SELECT L2Distance(arrayResize(v, {array_size}), arrayResize(materialize(v), {array_size})) AS d FROM array_distance_float32 )
SELECT sum(d) FROM ( SELECT L2SquaredDistance(arrayResize(v, {array_size}), arrayResize(materialize(v), {array_size})) AS d FROM array_distance_float32 )
SELECT sum(d) FROM ( SELECT LinfDistance(arrayResize(v, {array_size}), arrayResize(materialize(v), {array_size})) AS d FROM array_distance_float32 )
SELECT sum(d) FROM ( SELECT cosineDistance(arrayResize(v, {array_size}), arrayResize(materialize(v), {array_size})) AS d FROM array_distance_float32 )
SELECT sum(d) FROM ( SELECT L2Distance(arrayResize(u8, {array_size}), arrayResize(f64, {array_size})) AS d FROM array_distance_mixed )
SELECT sum(d) FROM ( SELECT cosineDistance(arrayResize(u8, {array_size}), arrayResize(f64, {array_size})) AS d FROM array_distance_mixed )
WITH (SELECT arrayResize(u8, {array_size}) FROM array_distance_mixed LIMIT 1) AS needle SELECT sum(d) FROM ( SELECT L2Distance(needle, arrayResize(f64, {array_size})) AS d FROM array_distance_mixed )
